name: RevokeMandate
description: Revoke (cancel) a mandate to prevent future recurring charges using this authorization. Once revoked, the mandate cannot be used for new payments and the action cannot be undone. The customer will need to provide a new authorization if you want to charge them again in the future. Use this when a customer cancels their subscription or requests to stop recurring payments. This endpoint requires the 'mandates.write' scope.

customer_id.description: The ID of the customer who owns the mandate (e.g., 'cst_abc123').

mandate_id.description: The ID of the mandate to revoke (e.g., 'mdt_abc123'). This action cannot be undone.

testmode.description: Enable test mode. Set to 'true' to revoke a test mode mandate, or omit for live mode.
